allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\crossfit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "d:\\crossfit"\)\) { Write-Host "Directory is empty or does not exist" })
PowerShell(node -e "const {DatabaseSync} = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\); console.log\('node:sqlite OK'\)")
